features: TALC-FREE FORMULA: Both body powders are 100% talc-free, offering a gentle and safe solution for daily body care needs
DUAL FRAGRANCES: Set includes two delightful scents - soothing lavender and fresh rose - providing options for different moods and preferences
MOISTURE CONTROL: Effectively absorbs excess moisture to keep skin dry and comfortable throughout the day
ANTI-CHAFING PROTECTION: Helps prevent skin irritation and chafing, making it ideal for daily use and physical activities
CONVENIENT PACKAGING: Each bottle features an easy-to-use design with clear labelling and decorative floral patterns
description: Product Description Discover comfort and freshness with Nuage Body Powder, now available in a delightful duo of Lavender and Rose scents. These 100% talc-free powders are specially formulated to absorb excess moisture and help prevent chafing, keeping you comfortable throughout your day. The Lavender variant offers a soothing, calming fragrance reminiscent of peaceful gardens, while the Rose option provides a classic, elegant floral scent. Both powders feature an easy-to-use bottle design with a convenient dispensing system. The gentle formula makes it suitable for daily use, helping you stay fresh and dry. Perfect for use after bathing or during warm weather, these body powders provide a silky-smooth feel on your skin. The beautifully designed bottles, adorned with delicate floral illustrations, make this set both functional and aesthetically pleasing for your personal care collection. Directions Apply to desired body areas after bathing or as needed to absorb moisture and prevent chafing. For daily use. Avoid contact with eyes and sensitive areas. Keep out of reach of children. Safety Warning Avoid contact with eyes and sensitive areas See more
